raw_consumer_statement: A {$5200.00} transfer was attempted by an unknown entity in early XXXX. We notified XXXX immediately that it was unauthorized and have filed disputes with the reporting agencies. The charge has reduced my credit score by about XXXX points and I do not know whether XXXX has removed the disputed amount ( the entire balance on the account ) from the account. The credit cards charged have been destroyed and replaced, but we are still waiting for more information. We have frozen all of our credit with all the reporting agencies and checked with our banks to make sure nothing has been attempted on those accounts.
